title: Phlomoides ariana
intro: Phlomoides ariana, also known as Ariana's phlomoides, is a plant species belonging to the Lamiaceae family, commonly found in the mountainous regions of Afghanistan and Pakistan. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, offering health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities, which may help in reducing inflammation and protecting against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Phlomoides ariana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which are commonly consumed to support respiratory health and to aid in the management of various health conditions.
